site_tagline: Multi-engine WCAG scanning for large, real websites.
site_description: a11y-catscan crawls HTML pages with Playwright and runs axe-core, Siteimprove Alfa, IBM Equal Access, and HTML_CodeSniffer into streaming reports.

docs.title: Getting started
docs.summary: Install dependencies, run a first scan, and read the generated reports.

docs.title: Configuration
docs.summary: YAML settings, CLI overrides, engines, WCAG levels, URL filters, and output naming.

docs.title: Scan workflows
docs.summary: Full crawls, single-page checks, URL lists, rescans, diffs, grouping, and resume.

docs.title: Authentication
docs.summary: Login plugins, saved storage state, session recovery, and logout-trap handling.

docs.title: Reports
docs.summary: JSONL, JSON, HTML, Markdown summaries, allowlists, and interpreting findings.

docs.title: MCP tools
docs.summary: Claude Code / MCP integration, tool list, safety model, and local setup.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.summary: Missing engines, browser launch failures, auth loops, robots.txt skips, and noisy reports.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.summary: Short answers for teams adopting a11y-catscan.

docs.title: Design
docs.summary: Architecture, source layout, lifecycles, safety boundaries, and testing model.
